hero.title: Move from raw tables to clear insights in one focused flow.
hero.lead: DataViz helps you import, validate, edit, summarize, and visualize tabular data in one place. It is built for practical student projects, academic demonstrations, and fast analytics iteration.

capabilitiesSection.title: Everything needed for table-first data work.
capabilitiesSection.description: The platform keeps the core analysis journey in one structured workspace so users can focus on understanding data instead of stitching tools together.

import.title: Import CSV or TXT datasets
import.text: Start quickly with tabular files and bring raw data into a dedicated project workspace.

validate.title: Validate structure and values
validate.text: Check inferred columns and detect issues before spending time on charts and interpretation.

edit.title: Inspect and edit rows directly
edit.text: Correct entries in a table-first interface so data cleaning stays close to the source values.

stats.title: Generate summary statistics
stats.text: Get fast descriptive metrics to understand distributions and guide the next analysis step.

chart.title: Build useful visualizations
chart.text: Create chart views from cleaned data and move from values to interpretable visual stories.

workspace.title: Work in one connected flow
workspace.text: Avoid fragmented tool chains and keep import, cleaning, analytics, and charts aligned.

advantagesSection.title: Built for practical analysis, not fragmented workflows.
advantagesSection.description: Typical workflows split data cleaning, validation, and charting across separate tools. DataViz keeps these steps connected, so each decision remains traceable and faster to verify.

workspace.title: One workspace instead of scattered tools
workspace.text: Reduce context switching between spreadsheet edits, scripts, and chart builders.

validation.title: Validation before visualization
validation.text: Catch schema and value issues early to protect chart quality and interpretation accuracy.

tableFirst.title: Table-first editing
tableFirst.text: Perform quick data corrections where rows are visible, without leaving the analysis context.

feedback.title: Fast analytical feedback
feedback.text: Summary statistics provide immediate checkpoints while refining datasets.

foundation.title: Stable foundation for academic extension
foundation.text: The architecture is structured for thesis demonstrations and iterative feature growth.

statsSection.title: From input to insight with fewer moving parts.
statsSection.description: These numbers summarize the core workflow scope and show how the platform keeps the analysis path concise and understandable.

steps.label: Workflow stages
steps.text: From first import to chart-driven conclusions.

actions.label: Core platform actions
actions.text: Import, validate, inspect, edit, analyze, visualize.

inputs.label: Tabular input formats
inputs.text: Ready for CSV and TXT datasets.

workspace.label: Integrated environment
workspace.text: A single place for the full data preparation cycle.

workflowSection.title: A clear workflow from first upload to final decision.
workflowSection.description: Each stage is intentionally simple, making the platform suitable for thesis demos, classroom exercises, and quick exploratory analysis sessions.

create.title: Create a project
create.text: Open a clean workspace for one dataset or research question.

import.title: Import your dataset
import.text: Load CSV or TXT files and start with visible table structure.

validate.title: Validate and inspect
validate.text: Review columns, value quality, and early consistency checks.

analyze.title: Edit and analyze
analyze.text: Clean rows directly and review summary statistics for direction.

visualize.title: Visualize and present
visualize.text: Build clear charts and translate findings into useful conclusions.

section.title: Create visual stories in seconds with a guided flow.
section.description: This mini demo shows how quickly users can switch between chart styles and still keep the result clean, readable, and presentation-ready.

benefits.refresh: Instant preview refresh with no manual reconfiguration.
benefits.visuals: Consistent dark-theme visuals for reports and demos.
benefits.workflow: Same workflow principles as the full project workspace.

quality.label: Quality trend
quality.title: Validation quality improves after each iteration
quality.subtitle: Dataset consistency score by sprint

distribution.label: Category mix
distribution.title: Cleaned data distribution by segment
distribution.subtitle: Rows kept after validation and editing

impact.label: Insight growth
impact.title: Actionable findings per analysis cycle
impact.subtitle: How quickly insights scale in one workspace

finalCta.title: Build your next dataset story without tool switching.
finalCta.description: Create a project, load your data, and move directly into validation, analysis, and visual reporting.
